title: why do the Pastoral Epistles sound so different from early accepted letters of Paul? why does it have such distinct vocabulary and features?
body:
# important features in this conversation
- the concept of the amanuensis ; how does this apply here? does it apply here?

# questions
- is it possible for Timothy to have relayed the contents to later churches who compiled it as a memorial of what Timothy relayed to them Paul had said to them?
labels: Bible problems | problems with the Bible
tags: Bible problems | problems with the Bible
